subcodes.first_line: O breezes of divine favors and O holy fragrances of mysteries, waft to the noblest of lands, the sacred spot of the All-Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایا نسمات الالطاف و ایا نفحات قدس الاسرار هبی الی اشرف الاوطان بقعه الرحمن
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @firmness in the Covenant, @martyrs and martyrdom
